{{/* Renders an enum / type-union as a single pill, e.g. enum: Standalone | Leader | Worker one of: integer | string Replaces the plain type badge in field.html when the field is an enum. */}} {{ $label := "enum" }} {{ $vals := slice }} {{ if .enum }} {{ $label = "enum" }} {{ range .enum }}{{ $vals = $vals | append (printf "%v" .) }}{{ end }} {{ else if .oneOf }} {{ $label = "one of" }} {{ range .oneOf }}{{ $vals = $vals | append .type }}{{ end }} {{ else if .anyOf }} {{ $label = "any of" }} {{ range .anyOf }}{{ $vals = $vals | append .type }}{{ end }} {{ else if .allOf }} {{ $label = "all of" }} {{ range .allOf }}{{ $vals = $vals | append .type }}{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ $label }}: {{ delimit $vals " | " }}
